## Task

Implement the basic input validation for `nitr::case003::CosineSimilarity(std::span<const double> a, std::span<const double> b)` in `src/cosine_similarity.cc`.

### Requirements
- Throw `std::invalid_argument` when the two input spans have different sizes.

### Constraints
- Keep the change localized to `src/cosine_similarity.cc`.
- Do not modify other files under `src/`.
- Do not modify evaluator files.
